title: サイレンススズカ、覚醒③

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day in October, a bizarre spectacle unfolds
at the Tokyo Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Unbelievable! There's so many people, you'd
think this was a G1 race!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Looking at the lineup, no one would blame you
for assuming it was.

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka is competing today. She's had a
string of victories lately.

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
On top of that, there's the famed Beast—Grass
Wonder—as well as El Condor Pasa, hailed as
being the strongest runner in the classic year...

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Ah, to think I get to watch such an exciting race! I
was right to make it my mission to follow these
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Suzuka, Grass, and El are all pals of mine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race kicks off under the watchful gaze of the
crowd.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Try as she might, Grass Wonder is struggling to
make any ground!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa is coming in from behind, but she
can't close the gap!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Which leaves Silence Suzuka, refusing to
relinquish the lead all the way to the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
She held the lead throughout the whole race yet
again...

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka's races are all so memorable—she
knows how to keep the crowd hooked.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Even though she was already so far ahead, she
still put on that extra burst at the end...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
There's just somethin' about the way Suzuka
runs... Wonder what it is?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This must be Silence Suzuka's newfound style of
running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her unique approach captivates the hearts of
those who witness it.
